1.name: Latte
steps: Brew 2 espresso shots into a large cup.
Steam milk to about 55�65�C (creamy microfoam).
Pour steamed milk over the espresso, holding back a little foam, then finish with the remaining microfoam.

2.name: Hot Chocolate
steps: Whisk cocoa powder, sugar, and a small splash of milk until smooth.
Add the remaining milk and salt.
Heat on medium-low, whisking, until hot and slightly thickened (do not boil hard).

3.name: Americano
steps: Brew 2 espresso shots into a mug.
Add hot water to taste strength and stir gently.

4.name: Cocoa
steps: Whisk cocoa powder, sugar, and a small splash of the liquid until smooth.
Warm the remaining liquid.
Whisk cocoa mixture into the warm liquid until fully dissolved and evenly colored.

5.name: Cortado
steps: Brew 1 espresso shot into a small cup.
Steam milk briefly so it is warm with minimal foam.
Pour milk into the espresso to achieve a roughly 1:1 ratio.

6.name: Americano with Milk
steps: Brew 1 espresso shot into a mug.
Add hot water to form the Americano base.
Add milk (steamed or hot) and stir gently.

7.name: Espresso
steps: Grind beans
Brew 30ml shot

8.name: Cappuccino
steps: Brew espresso
Steam milk to thick foam
Pour over espresso
